center.name: 厄尔布尔士山脉
center.summary: 厄尔布尔士山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括裡海角雞，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of eastern Turkey, Armenia, Azerbaijan and throughout the Alborz Mountains of Northern Iran

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the mountains of eastern Turkey, Armenia, Azerbaijan and throughout the Alborz Mountains of Northern Iran
